Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shepherds]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — The Shepherds provide observations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — There are four Shepherds on standby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — The Shepherds observed that Rudeus Maxwell was a nobody.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shepherds are black shadows that clean up after battles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shepherds are a group that Shera might be sent with on an assignment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shepherds are mentioned as forces that could be lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shepherds provide information in the area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Shepherds are highly trained in stealth and observation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Shepherds use blue scale whistles as Awakened tools to control Deepstriders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Shepherds are part of Meia's crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Shepherds with muskets surrounded the crater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Tyril rose from the Shepherds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Shepherds wear black clothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Shepherds are a group that Kerian takes with her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — The Shepherds are Consultants.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Shepherds are a group within the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Shepherds are trained in observation and reconnaissance rather than combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Shepherds are dedicated to scouting and observation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Shepherds carry steel blades on their ankles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Shepherds watch the flock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Shepherds are a group that can materialize and act as guards or attendants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Shepherds followed Kerian and Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Shepherds were preparing for war.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Shepherds are an order of Consultant that uses skintight black silks as symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Shepherds hide to show off their skills.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Shepherds are spies, not assassins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Shepherds watch from rooftops to prevent eavesdropping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Shepherds are black-clad Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Three Shepherds rushed forward to provide Shera with a stool, a headache pill, and water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Shepherds were positioned to spread discontent with news-sheets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Some Shepherds were incapacitated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Shera dispatched a team of Shepherds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Shepherds removed the chairs from the conference room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shepherds carried Ayana off after she was bound by Meia.}}

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Shepherds are mages of the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Shepherds are capable of casting spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — Shepherds are individuals in black hoods who belong to the Hive.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Shepherds can protect a Hive.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
